sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3994" key="*)alecandri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀλεξανδρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n3994.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be on Alexander's side</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apolloph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1609.tlg001:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phylarch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
